title: Favorite WordPress Plugins
body:
Essential plugins:

-   [Google Sitemap Generator](http://www.arnebrachhold.de/2005/06/05/google-sitemaps-generator-v2-final): Automatically generates your sitemap.xml and sitemap.xml.gz files so you can submit them to **Google**.
-   [Google Analyticator](http://cavemonkey50.com/code/google-analyticator/): Lets you add your **Google Analytics** code without having to edit your theme.
-   [Installer](http://mattread.com/projects/wp-plugins/installer-the-plugin/): Installs plugins and themes directly from your blog’s admin panel. No more FTP manager needed to upload your plugins.
-   [WP-SWFObject](http://blog.unijimpe.net/wp-swfobject/): Allows you to embed **Flash** content in your posts or anywhere on your blog.
-   [iG:Syntax Hiliter](http://blog.igeek.info/wp-plugins/igsyntax-hiliter/): With this plugin, you can write source code in your posts, and the plugin will automatically syntax-highlight it based on the language. It supports multiple languages, including **ActionScript**.
-   [Akismet](http://akismet.com/): Say goodbye to spam—you’ll no longer waste time moderating comments. This plugin is simply fabulous.
-   [AdSense Deluxe](http://www.acmetech.com/blog/adsense-deluxe/): This allows you to insert **AdSense** ads into your blog without having to edit your theme—it’s all automated.
-   [Feedburner Feed Replacement](http://orderedlist.com/wordpress-plugins/feedburner-plugin/): Redirects your feed readers to the **FeedBurner** feed manager
-   [Sig2feed](http://www.smackfoo.com/plugins/sig2feed/): Lets you add a custom message at the end of each post in your feeds to prevent autoblogs from copying your content for free.
-   [Contact Form](http://chip.cuccio.us/projects/contact-form-II/): Makes it easy to add a contact form to your blog, all without writing any code.
-   [WP-SnapPreview](http://blog.unijimpe.net/wp-snappreview/): Inserts tooltips with a thumbnail of the linked URL, using the Snap Preview Anywhere(TM) service.
-   [Extended Live Archives](http://www.sonsofskadi.net/extended-live-archive/): An AJAX-based archive system.
-   [Brian’s Latest Comments](http://meidell.dk/archives/2005/11/09/brians-latest-comments-155/) to display the latest comments made on your blog.
-   [Delicious Cached](http://www.w-a-s-a-b-i.com/archives/2004/10/15/delisious-cached/) displays the latest links you’ve added to your del.icio.us
-   [Flickr RSS](http://eightface.com/wordpress/flickrrss/) displays your latest photos added to Flickr.
-   [Gravatar](http://www.gravatar.com/implement.php#section_2_2) displays commenters’ avatars.
-   [Noteworthy Posts](http://webdeveloper.uk.com/noteworthy) highlights certain posts by awarding them a “badge.”
-   [Subscribe to Comments](http://txfx.net/search/subscribe%20to%20comments%202) gives your visitors the option to subscribe to comments on a specific post.
-   [Ultimate Tag Warrior](http://www.neato.co.nz/ultimate-tag-warrior/) lets you add tags to your posts.
-   [Related Entries](http://wasabi.pbwiki.com/Related%20Entries) displays articles related to the one the visitor is reading.
